message:
feat(ffs-cli): add production Cx acquisition helpers for CLI commands

Replace Cx::for_testing() with proper production context throughout CLI:
- Add cli_cx() that creates Cx via Cx::for_request() with real runtime budgets
- Add cli_cx_with_timeout_secs() helper using Cx::for_request_with_budget()
  with a configurable deadline (currently dead_code, reserved for future use)
- Update inspect() to use cli_cx() instead of test context

This ensures CLI commands operate with production-grade budgets and
cancellation semantics rather than the unlimited test harness.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
